popularStory.headline: KING AETHELRED OF ENGLAND BIOGRAPHY
popularStory.description: King Ethelred of Wessex II "The Unready" was born circa 968 in Wessex, England and married 1002 in Wessex, England. He died 23 Apr 1016 in London, Middlesex County, England and was buried in St. Paul' …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Æthelred 'the Unready' King of England於0968年3月19日出生在英國時，他的父親Edgar the Peacemaker King of England24歲，母親Elfthryth Aethelflaeda 'The Fair' De England Queen Of England23歲。他於0985年與Ælfgifu of York在英國諾圖恩布利亞結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1016年4月23日在英國米德萊可倫敦享年48歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭倫敦聖 包利斯 凱德拉爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Æthelred 'the Unready' King of England于0968年3月19日出生在英国时，他的父亲Edgar the Peacemaker King of England24岁，母亲Elfthryth Aethelflaeda 'The Fair' De England Queen Of England23岁。他于0985年与Ælfgifu of York在英国諾圖恩布利亞结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1016年4月23日在英国米德萊可倫敦享年48岁，埋葬在英国英格兰倫敦聖 包利斯 凱德拉爾。

nameMeanings.name: Æthelred
meanings: A male name, in Anglo-Saxon found written Æthelred, from Anglo-Saxon ethel-red, noble counsel, or noble counsellor.

nameMeanings.name: 'the
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Dorothea  , also used independently.

historicEvents.title: Vikings Invade England
historicEvents.description: Viking raiders from Scandinavia invaded England in 980. Years later in 991, the English government paid them 10,000 in hopes for peace. The Viking raiders, however, continued to force more money from England.

historicEvents.title: Danes Attack London
historicEvents.description: Danes and Norwegians attacked London unsuccessfully in 994.

historicEvents.title: St. Brice's Day Massacre
historicEvents.description: King Aethelred ordered all Danish men in England to be killed. It is unknown how many Danes were killed due to this order.

historicEvents.title: Sweyn Forkbeard
historicEvents.description: The Danes raided and captured England. Sweyn, King of Danes, was declared King of England on Christmas Day.

historicEvents.title: Canut the Great
historicEvents.description: As Aethelred, King of England died, his son, Edmund Ironside devised a truce with Danish King Canute. The truce divided the kingdom between the two but Edmund died shortly after and became King of England. Several years later, he also became king of Denmark.

en.lifeSummary: When Æthelred 'the Unready' King of England was born on 19 March 0968, in England, his father, Edgar the Peacemaker King of England, was 24 and his mother, Elfthryth Aethelflaeda 'The Fair' De England Queen Of England, was 23. He married Ælfgifu of York in 0985, in Northumbria, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 23 April 1016, in London, Middlesex, England, at the age of 48, and was buried in St Paul's Cathedral, London, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Æthelred 'the Unready' King of England est né le 19 mars 0968, à Angleterre, son père, Edgar the Peacemaker King of England, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Elfthryth Aethelflaeda 'The Fair' De England Queen Of England, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Ælfgifu of York en 0985, à Northumbria, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 23 avril 1016, à Londres, Middlesex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 48 ans, et a été enterré à St Paul's Cathedral, Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Æthelred 'the Unready' King of England am 19. März 0968 in England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Edgar the Peacemaker King of England 24 und seine Mutter Elfthryth Aethelflaeda 'The Fair' De England Queen Of England 23. Er hat 0985 in Northumbria, England Ælfgifu of York geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 23. April 1016 im Alter von 48 Jahren in London, Middlesex, England und wurde in St Paul's Cathedral, London, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Æthelred 'the Unready' King of England è nato il il 19 marzo 0968 nel England, il suo padre, Edgar the Peacemaker King of England, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Elfthryth Aethelflaeda 'The Fair' De England Queen Of England, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Ælfgifu of York nel 0985, nel Northumbria, England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 23 aprile 1016, nel London, Middlesex, England, all'età di 48 anni, e fu sepolto a St Paul's Cathedral, London, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Æthelred 'the Unready' King of Englandが0968年3月19日にイギリスで生まれた時，父Edgar the Peacemaker King of Englandは24歳，母Elfthryth Aethelflaeda 'The Fair' De England Queen Of Englandは23歳であった。0985年にイギリスノースウンブリアでÆlfgifu of Yorkと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1016年4月23日にイギリスミッドレセックスロンドンで48歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスロンドンスト プアウル'ス カスエドラルにて埋葬された。

ko.Kingston-upon-Thames, Surrey: 영국 잉글랜드 수리 킨그스턴 업 섬스

ko.lifeSummary: Æthelred 'the Unready' King of England(이)가 0968년 3월 19일 영국에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Edgar the Peacemaker King of England(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Elfthryth Aethelflaeda 'The Fair' De England Queen Of England(은)는 23세였다. 그는 0985년 영국 노르스브리아에서 Ælfgifu of York(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1016년 4월 23일 영국 미들레세스 런던에서 48세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 런던 스트 폴'스 캐테드럴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Æthelred 'the Unready' King of England nasceu em 19 de março de 0968, em Inglaterra, seu pai, Edgar the Peacemaker King of England, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Elfthryth Aethelflaeda 'The Fair' De England Queen Of England, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Ælfgifu of York em 0985, em Northumbria, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 23 de abril de 1016, em London, Middlesex, Inglaterra, com 48 anos, e foi sepultado em St Paul's Cathedral, London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Æthelred 'the Unready' King of England родился 19 марта 0968 г. в местности Англия, его отцу по имени Edgar the Peacemaker King of England было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Elfthryth Aethelflaeda 'The Fair' De England Queen Of England, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Ælfgifu of York в 0985 г. в местности нортумбря, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он умер 23 апреля 1016 г. в местности Лондон, миддлесекс, Англия в возрасте 48 лет и был похоронен в местности ст поул'с кэтедраль, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Æthelred 'the Unready' King of England nació el 19 de marzo de 0968, en Inglaterra, su papá, Edgar the Peacemaker King of England, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Elfthryth Aethelflaeda 'The Fair' De England Queen Of England, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Ælfgifu of York en 0985, en Northumbria, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 23 de abril de 1016, en London, Middlesex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 48 años, y fue sepultado en St Paul's Cathedral, London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
